name: Mid-range Gaming Build
description: User wants a 1440p gaming PC around $1500
user_messages: I want to build a gaming PC for about $1500. I play AAA games at 1440p.
I prefer NVIDIA GPUs. Mid tower case is fine. No RGB preference.

name: ML Training Workstation
description: Data scientist needs a GPU-heavy ML training rig
user_messages: I need a machine learning training workstation. Budget is $3000. I train large models so I need maximum GPU VRAM and at least 64GB RAM.
I'll use PyTorch mostly. AMD or Intel CPU is fine. I want room to upgrade RAM later.

name: Budget Office PC
description: Basic office computer for web, email, and spreadsheets under $500
user_messages: I need a basic office computer for web browsing, email, and spreadsheets. Keep it under $500. No gaming at all.

name: 4K Video Editing Workstation
description: Professional 4K video editor using DaVinci Resolve
user_messages: I edit 4K video in DaVinci Resolve and After Effects. Budget is $2500.
I need at least 64GB RAM and fast storage. I prefer AMD CPUs with lots of cores.

name: Compact Mini-ITX Gaming Build
description: Small form factor gaming PC with specific constraints
user_messages: Build me a compact Mini ITX gaming PC. $2000 budget. Must be small form factor.
I want it quiet. Air cooling only, no liquid cooling please.
